_comment: Ported from V1 backup api-format workflow. Per-branch positive encoders use `from: main_prompt` + `prefix:` to bake the angle keyword in front of the user's subject description. The shared UNet/CLIP/VAE/LoRAs are pinned with literal: bindings to the V1-era filenames; edit via the sidebar if you have different versions installed.
label: Face 3-View
description: Qwen-Image-Edit 2511 + Multiple-Angles LoRA + Lightning 4-step. One workflow, three parallel KSampler branches sharing the same model and base latent — front / 3/4 / side face shots. The user's main_prompt is prefixed with each branch's angle keyword via the resolver's `prefix` modifier.

image.error: Face 3-View needs an upstream image — wire one into the image slot.

prompt.prefix: <sks> front view eye-level shot medium shot, close-up portrait,
<sks> right side view eye-level shot medium shot, close-up portrait,
<sks> front-right quarter view eye-level shot medium shot, close-up portrait,
